pi_items.source: Task description, setup_task.sh line 37, export_result.sh line 52, verifier.py checks source_created
Task description, Odoo HR official demo data (setup_data.py line 13), export_result.sh line 44 verification
Task description line 2, setup_task.sh line 28, export_result.sh line 71 search, verifier.py checks applicant_created
Task description mentions email, but export_result.sh does not retrieve email field (only source_id, job_id, create_date) and verifier.py does not check email at all

privileged_info_summary: The task requires the agent to create a recruitment source named 'TechCrunch' linked to the 'Experienced Developer' job position, which exists in Odoo's official HR demo dataset. The agent must also create an applicant named 'Jane Tech' (email jane@tech.com per task description) and link the applicant to the TechCrunch source. The verifier confirms success by checking: (1) TechCrunch source exists and is linked to Experienced Developer job (30 pts), (2) Jane Tech applicant exists (30 pts), and (3) applicant is correctly linked to the TechCrunch source (40 pts). However, the email field is not validated by any verification code.
